title: pelargonium × psilophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × psilophyllum, also known as Red Form, is a hybrid species within the Pelargonium genus, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium inquinans and Pelargonium fasciculatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × psilophyllum are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of sore throats, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
